name: North Carolina Plumbing, Heating and Fire Sprinkler Contractors Verify License Search

agency.name: State Board of Examiners of Plumbing, Heating and Fire Sprinkler Contractors

termsReviewNotes: Official board and public-search pages were reviewed; no source-specific reuse terms page was confirmed in this phase.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official public search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: North Carolina plumbing, heating, fuel piping, and fire sprinkler contractor and technician classifications exposed by the public verify-license search
knownExclusions: This source is scoped to licenses regulated by the State Board of Examiners of Plumbing, Heating and Fire Sprinkler Contractors.
General contracting, electrical contracting, local permits, and municipal registrations are outside this source entry.
The official source is lookup-oriented; no stable machine-readable bulk export has been confirmed for OpenTrade ingestion.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should respect the public-search workflow and prefer official bulk options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official plumbing, heating, fuel-piping, and fire-sprinkler lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that an authorization, local permit, or other credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for North Carolina plumbing, heating, fuel-piping, and fire-sprinkler contractor verification. The public search lists many classifications, but OpenTrade does not automate it without a separate access-control and terms review.
maintainerNotes: Keep this source separate from the North Carolina general contractor and electrical contractor board entries.

researchEvidence.note: Official public verify-license search reviewed; it lists plumbing, heating, fuel piping, fire sprinkler, and related technician classifications.
Official board homepage reviewed for agency scope covering plumbing, heating, fuel gas piping, and fire sprinkler trades.

blocker.summary: An official lookup exists, but no stable, documented machine-readable source has been adapter-reviewed with offline fixtures.
